functions.title: Guide Book #23
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #23§r
§lPowders & Dusts§r
 
•Cocoa Powder
•Charcoal Powder
•Gold Powder
•Iron Powder
•Lapis Lazuli Powder
•Amethyst Powder
•Emerald Powder
•Diamond Powder
•Netherite Powder
•Enchanted Dust

§lCocoa Powder§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table, Artifacture Table.
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lDispensable§r: YES
•§lOffhand Equippable§r: YES
•§lProjectile of§r: Powder Staff

•§lImpact Hit Damage§r: 7
•§lImpact Area Damage§r: 2 in 2-block radius.
•§lImpact Effect§r: Magical Scourge I, Spirit Piercer.
•§lUsed to craft§r: Chocolate Bar, Chocolate Drinks, Lush Quill, Cocoa Beans.
•Can be used to transform the Spore Pot into a Cocoa Spore Pot.

§8ITEM§r

•Can be used to transform the Spore Pot into a Charcoal Spore Pot.

§lGold Powder§r

Scroll of Resurgence, Scroll of Hoarding, Enchanted Dust, Gold Nugget.
•Can be used to transform the Spore Pot into a Gold Spore Pot.
